caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVE DO SHIT" and a green baseball cap with headphones over it. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, speaking while looking slightly off-camera. Behind him is a white wall adorned with various framed photographs and a white mannequin torso wearing a garment with a black graphic. To the right, clothing racks with various garments are visible. In the bottom corners of the scene, logos for "SODA TALK" and another circular logo are present. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, subtly shifting his facial expressions and mouth movements as he speaks. The background remains static, and the camera angle is fixed, capturing the man from the chest up as he continues his conversation.
